title: Trimmed Tools - Redstone
description: This rescource pack trims your tools/weapons with an redstone trim!
body:
[![kinetic hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3e5234712d32562be999b307b425ca6286f4b8e_0.webp)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=1433)
This rescource pack trims your tools/weapons with an redstone trim! This does not require any actual armor trim and will only be seen by you. make sure to check out all the other trim colors too ofcourse!
